title: Authentication Verification Disabled or Bypassed
description: An authentication, signature, or certificate verification check is explicitly disabled. Disabling these controls allows forged tokens, expired sessions, or untrusted certificates to be accepted.

finding.message: Authentication check '{{token}}' is disabled in {{file}} at line {{line}}.

references: Never disable token expiry, signature verification, or certificate validation in production.
Gate any test-only bypass behind an environment check and ensure it cannot reach production.
For JWT: always specify and enforce the expected algorithm set; reject the 'none' algorithm.
